step_by_step_reasoning: We analyze the architecture based on the whiteboard and the transcript. The system is a single-tenant isolated risk and reporting application stack deployed per client. We identify the deployment/orchestration block (ECS, AMI with Terraform/Jenkins/Ansible tools), the database and analytics block (RDS for OLTP, Redshift for OLAP, querying S3 via Redshift Spectrum), and the security/monitoring suite (KMS, Security Hub, GuardDuty, Config, CloudWatch, CloudTrail). We map out the deployment flow, the database querying flow, and the security compliance flow.

graph.name: Axiom SL - Automated Single Tenant SaaS Risk and Reporting Platform
graph.notes: Automated deployment of single-tenant application stacks using ECS and RDS/Redshift. Uses Redshift Spectrum for warm historical queries on S3, coupled with comprehensive native security services.

nodes.name: ECS Orchestration
nodes.notes: WORKLOAD_PEEK: Manages the containerized application stack for each tenant environment.

nodes.name: CIS Hardened AMIs
nodes.notes: CIS-hardened images built for every environment and client.

nodes.name: RDS (OLTP)
nodes.notes: Handles transactional database workloads (OLTP) for the risk platform.

nodes.name: Redshift (OLAP)
nodes.notes: DATA_PEEK: Processes large volumes of analytical risk data using RA3 nodes for independent scaling of compute and storage.

nodes.name: Amazon S3
nodes.notes: DATA_PEEK: Stores historical and warm data, fully encrypted at rest.

nodes.name: KMS Key Management
nodes.notes: Provides end-to-end data encryption keys for transit and rest.

nodes.name: AWS Config
nodes.notes: Tracks resource configurations and automates incident response.

nodes.name: Amazon CloudWatch
nodes.notes: Monitors application events and triggers security alerts.

nodes.name: AWS CloudTrail
nodes.notes: Records user activity and API usage.

edges.notes: Orchestrates build and packaging of hardened virtual images.
Deploys the transactional database components within the isolated stack.
Provisions analytical database capacity for client environments.
Redshift Spectrum queries historical and warm data stored in S3.
Pushes system metrics and logs to CloudWatch.
Monitors performance and analytics workload state.
Delivers activity logs securely to S3 buckets.
